Emergency Mode

Quick Help
🚨 Ammonia Spike

New tank, deaths, fish stress.

🐟 Fish Gasping

Low oxygen or surface breathing.

🪸 Coral Crash

Melting, bailout, sudden decline.

🌊 Salinity Swing

ATO or water change mistake.

🔥 Heater Failure

Tank too hot or too cold.

⚡ Power Cut

No flow, heat or filtration.

Action Plan

Select issue
Choose an emergency above

Quick steps will appear here.

Customise AquoraX

Theme

Text colour, app accent colours and background controls are now separated so users can customise the app without getting lost.

Global Text ColourChanges all main writing across the app
App Accent / Theme ColourChanges buttons, glows, highlights and app energy
Background ImageUpload a tank/coral background and control darkness
Large phone photos will be compressed automatically.

Data Safety

Protected
Local Backup Protection

Every save creates a safety copy before changing your reef data. Cloud save avoids duplicating large coral photos locally to prevent storage errors.
